title: OpenAI outlines sales workflows for ChatGPT Work
summary: OpenAI has published a sales-focused guide for ChatGPT Work, positioning it for account briefs, meeting preparation, forecast reviews, close plans and stalled-deal analysis across connected customer-work systems.
friendlySummary: OpenAI explains how sales teams can use ChatGPT Work to prepare for meetings, review deals and plan next steps.
whyItMatters: For revenue teams, the near-term value is likely in reducing preparation and follow-up overhead while keeping relationship strategy and customer judgement with the seller.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It could save time on admin work, so salespeople can spend more time with customers and use their own judgement.
